ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used in the experiment */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used in the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the experiment belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., healthy, diseased) */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the sample belongs to */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue (e.g., blood, tissue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markers" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the marker */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marker */,
  "marker_type" TEXT /* Type of the marker (e.g., protein, gene) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_values" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression value */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the expression value belongs to */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker the expression value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Expression value of the marker for the sample */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., MFI, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_values_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_values_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES markers ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, technician) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the analysis belongs to */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., clustering, PCA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., heatmap, scatter plot) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "study_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "study_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "patient_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "patient_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "researcher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "researcher_institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the collaboration belongs to */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher the collaboration belongs to */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the publication belongs to */,
  "publication_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "publication_link" TEXT /* Link to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., FCS, CSV) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)
